title: Mini simulator
description: A 5-minute free flight to practice what you learned: take off, climb, turn and land.

briefing.title: Ready for takeoff?
briefing.body: Apply full throttle to accelerate down the runway. Above 20 m/s, pull gently (S) to lift the nose. Keep your speed up — if you fly too slowly, the wing will stall.

stallWarning: STALL — lower the nose and add power

controls.title: Controls
controls.touch: Touch screen: left joystick = pitch and roll · right slider = throttle · bottom buttons = rudder

success.title: Mission accomplished!
success.body: Well flown. Pick your next mission or fly this one again.

free-flight.title: Free flight
free-flight.objective: 5 minutes of open sky — practice whatever you like.

first-takeoff.title: First takeoff
first-takeoff.objective: Take off and climb to 100 m.

heading-turn.title: Turn to heading
heading-turn.objective: Above 40 m, hold heading 270° for 3 seconds.

safe-landing.title: Safe landing
safe-landing.objective: Climb above 60 m, then land gently back on the ground.

cross-country.title: Cross-country leg
cross-country.objective: Climb above 80 m and hold heading 090° for 4 seconds.

timeUp.title: Flight session complete
timeUp.body: Your 5 minutes are up. Review a theory module or start a new flight.

crash.title: Rough landing!
crash.body: You hit the ground too hard or too banked. Level the wings and descend gently before touching down.

water.title: Down in the water!
water.body: You touched down outside the runway. Line up with the strip and land on it.

bounds.title: Lost over open sea
bounds.body: You flew too far from the flight area. Watch for the warning and turn back in time.
